videos.description: DeBoer discusses why he made the eventual game-winning decision to go for it on fourth down and speaks on the No. 10 Crimson Tide's journey after beating rival Auburn.

videos.headline: Breaking down Alabama's narrow victory over Auburn in the Iron Bowl
videos.description: SEC Now's Chris Doering and Benjamin Watson list the deciding factors that changed the game and allowed the No. 10 Crimson Tide to take down the Tigers in Jordan-Hare Stadium.
